name: Balboa Park Station / Green Yard
summary_en: Archive documents cover Balboa Park Station and the adjacent Curtis E. Green (Light Rail) Center rail yard, including the Balboa Park Station Area Plan public review draft and DEIR comments-and-responses, a 2009 pedestrian and bicycle connection project, and Municipal Railway records placing the Green Light Rail Center at 425 Geneva Street (Geneva & San Jose Avenues). MTA notices reference Contract No. 1249 for Green Light Rail Center track replacement and an emergency switch replacement project, plus a 2011 notice on renaming the facility the Cameron Beach Yard. The station and yard are operated by the Municipal Transportation Agency, whose FY2025 budget line is $1.5B; no place-specific city contract appears in this data.
